rag_rules: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations in component type annexes
Use assignments in implementation annexes only for existing outputs or auxiliary variables
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit model ports/constants
generic_rules: Use exact current-case names from the model index
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
For output dependency contracts, relate visible outputs to visible inputs
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees only when concrete bounds are available
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for contracts
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations and `const name : type = value;` for constants
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit model ports/constants
